data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Remote participant visibility on classroom screen', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions remote students being visible on a screen, but it does not provide concrete API reads or persisted state checks to confirm that this functionality is operational. Therefore, a gap exists in the evidence regarding the visibility of remote participants on the classroom screen.
gaps: No evidence confirming the functionality of remote participant visibility on classroom screen.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
